post.article: Python is a high-level, interpreted, general-purpose programming language. Its designphilosophy emphasizes code readability with the use of significant indentation. Python is dynamically-typed and garbage-collected. Python is a popular programming language. It was created by Guido van Rossum, and released in 1991.

CONGRATULATIONS !!,The Wai Wai Glocal Teen Hero Nepal for the Year 2022 is Mr. Rahul Ranjan Sah.
post.article: The Wai Wai Glocal Teen Hero Nepal for the Year 2022 is Mr. Rahul Ranjan Sah. He is Astronomy Enthusiast from Dhanusha. He is devoted to astronomical research. He is associated with the Nepal Astronomical Society, Student Exploration and Development of Space-Nepal. He is also a founder member of Student Development and Exploration in Space - SXC. His works have created an immense impact on building the bridge for underprivileged students. He is passionate and hardworking in Nature. #winner2022 #gthfinalist #gthnepal2022 #DEVCommunityNepal

post.name: A demo of hacking a vulnerable site using cookie only.
post.article: From few days I am learning intermediate SQL and PHP, I liked to implement them and create a new project. I watched a tutorial and made a project as he described. But I suddenly found this vulnerability. Be aware of what you are copying. 😂 #codingforbeginners #DEVCommunityNepal

His eagerness to learn new technology & things have led him today to this stage where he can build amazing websites on his own. He is the inspiration for all of us.  So many students and people ask us, what should be the motivation during coding? The answer is simple, you need to have a growth mindset and have eager to learn new things daily in your life.  #DEVCommunityNepal #programmerlife #coding

post.name: Happy Father's Day!! 🥰🙂😃
#day6ofclg_askmitra
post.article: Konnichiwa, this is Sushant Rimal Again as you all know I'm participating in the ITSNP 30-day challenge and Today is my sixth day. I encourage everyone to begin their 30 days by learning anything they choose; it will be fun. I’m excited already. If you want to start learning more about this program here: https://askmitra.com/clg/ Here's what I learned today.  -- Python Strings -- Slicing Strings -- Modify Strings -- Format Strings -- Strings Methods Summary: Well, Today we learned about Python Strings in deep. Strings in python are surrounded by either single quotation marks or double quotation marks.  'hello' is the same as `hello`. We can display a string literal with the print() function. We can return a range of characters by using the slice syntax. Python has a set of built-in methods that you can use on strings. Watch Here Full Video: https://www.youtube.com/playlist...  Subscribe to us and Support us to make free videos: https://www.youtube.com/c/DEVCommunityNepal I've also included links to some of the resources I used if anybody interested can follow along. Learning Resources:  1. https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_strings_methods.asp 2. https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_strings_slicing.asp 3. https://www.w3schools.com/python/python_strings_modify.asp #Day6ofClg_askmitra #learningeveryday #growingeveryday #DEVCommunityNepal  Start here: https://askmitra.com/clg/S

post.name: Team Nepal(Pulchowk Robotics Club) has successfully secured 3rd place in ABU Robocon 2022 along with Nagase Award.
post.article: It's a history that Nepal got into the semifinal for the first time in 22 years making victory over India(A), Thailand, and India(B). Pc: Manish Guruwacharya #Congratulations #IOE #pulchowkcampus
